name: feature-build-team
description: Parallel frontend and backend implementation team. Runs against an approved API contract. FE and BE work simultaneously and can message each other directly.
lead_instructions: You are the team lead. Your job is to coordinate the frontend and backend teammates. Assign tasks from tasks/[feature].md, monitor for escalations, and synthesise results. You do NOT write code yourself.

teammates.name: frontend
teammates.description: Frontend implementation. Reads contract, builds UI, can message backend directly.

teammates.name: backend
teammates.description: Backend implementation. Reads contract, builds API/data, can message frontend directly.

notes: Both teammates read the same api-contract.yaml — this is the handshake
Teammates should message each other before escalating to human where possible
If both teammates agree an escalation is needed, it carries more weight
